name: Potato Soup, Peasant Style
recipeIngredient: 3 medium potatoes, peeled and cut into small cubes
1/2 small green pepper, seeded and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan over medium heat, melt the butter.
2. Add flour and cook, stirring constantly, until well blended and lightly golden (about 3 minutes).
3. Add potatoes, paprika, carrot, onion, tomato, and green pepper; stir well.
4. Pour in water and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer until vegetables are tender (about 25 minutes).
